pass1_quick_scan.goal: Understand the problem and whether the proposed solution works

steps.objective: Understand the main contribution and results
questions_to_answer: What problem does the paper address?
What is the main contribution of the paper?
steps.expected_output: Understand the problem and the proposed solution

questions_to_answer: How do the results compare to the state-of-the-art?
What is the motivation behind the paper?
How does the paper relate to existing work?

pass2_method_understanding.goal: Understand what was built and how it was evaluated

questions_to_answer: What are the main components of the model?
What data was used for training?
What metrics were used for evaluation?

pass3_deep_analysis.goal: Critical analysis of whether the method is sound and generalizable

questions_to_answer: How does the attention mechanism work?
What are the benefits of using attention?
What are the different model variations?
How do the model variations affect the results?

steps.objective: Understand the limitations and future work
questions_to_answer: What are the limitations of the paper?
What are the potential future directions?
steps.expected_output: Understand the limitations and future work

final_user_task.summary_task: Summarize the main contribution and results of the paper
reflection_questions: What are the implications of the paper?
How can the paper be improved?
